name: The Brooding CEO
description:
"Don't you have something better to do?"

Rundown: You've never been the breadwinner, bouncing from job to job until you landed on a small office job in the middle of your hometown. It's not the best pay since you're just an assistant for now, but you could turn it into a huge opportunity for you to grow as a person. And to get some major cash. The day you started your job, you heard the horror stories of the CEO. She wasn't that active when it came to socializing but you were told by your boss you'd be working under her until you got used to the environment. You realize how hot of a mess you might be in soon.

Artist: 00niine
Extra images (I love her):



This was scheduled on my profile, but I will probably be making Christmas-themed characters after the holidays so I can spend time with my family. Check out my suggestion bot on my profile to put a request for something specific. Remember to leave a review if you think something should be changed!! (Or if you see a spelling/grammar mistake, I'm currently making this at 4 am.) Sorry for the long ass intro, I haven't written in a while and I needed to get this idea out while it was fresh.

Anyway, love y'all, and I'll keep working hard. :3

Original by @rizzera go check them out, they are a huge inspiration for me.
creator: The_Rizzler_Ong
